The '''Ssi'kaat system''' contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]]. Its primary [[Star/Legends|star]] was [[Ssi'kaat]].<ref name="EGPM">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> It was located in the [[Ssi-ruuk Star Cluster|Ssi-Ruuvi Cluster]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].

{{System-stub}}
